## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Related Issues

Link issues here (for example: `Closes #123`).

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change.

```bash
cargo test --workspace
```

If relevant, include sample CLI commands and output:

```bash
cargo run -p kroot -- diagnose cluster
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `cargo test --workspace`.
- [ ] I updated tests for new behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs/README if behavior or commands changed.
- [ ] I kept changes focused and avoided unrelated edits.
